title: CCTV Infrared Night Mode Activation Versus Local Sunset Window
app: Custom TA (NVR REST/syslog), ONVIF pull, Hikvision ISAPI HEC, or Milestone connector mapped to listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=physical sourcetype="cctv:analytics" earliest=-7d
| where match(lower(mode), "(?i)ir|night|mono")
| eval hour=strftime(_time,"%H")
| stats count by camera_id hour
description: IR stuck on suggests faulty photocells; never switching hints blocked filters hurting low-light quality.
value: Reduces noisy night video tickets and IR LED wear.
implementation: (1) Ingest day/night mode changes. (2) Compare to astronomical twilight table.
grandmaExplanation: We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.
knownFalsePositives: Sensor anomalies during cleaning, calibration, or planned environmental changes.
